note.zh: GPT-5.6-Terra(xhigh 思考档位)在 Codex CLI 中用仓库标准中文提示词(仅按案例规则填写文末【本次运行】占位符)一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则,策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行。模型未按要求提供自命名。该产物的 act() 在部分局面抛异常,按规则退化为该 tick 直行,不做任何修复——这是其真实 one-shot 表现。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by GPT-5.6-Terra (xhigh effort) in Codex CLI from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt (only the [This run] placeholders filled per case rules), with no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished; this entry registers the maintainer-executed run. The model did not provide the requested self-name. Its act() throws in some states and degrades to straight moves for those ticks per the rules; no fix applied — that is its true one-shot behavior.
